<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Returns budget response"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/Customer/{customerId}/{customerSiteId}/budget"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves customer budget for a specific site.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"customerId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"customerSiteId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer Site ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"granularity","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Granularity type: day, week, month, or billingperiod","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["day","week","month","billingperiod"]}},{"name":"startDate","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Start date (ISO 8601 format)","schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},{"name":"endDate","in":"query","required":false,"description":"End date (ISO 8601 format)","schema":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns budget information.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customerId":{"type":"integer","example":699493},"customerSiteId":{"type":"integer","example":799644},"goalType":{"type":"string","description":"Budget goal type: standard, eco, or custom","example":"standard"},"standardAmount":{"type":"number","example":150},"ecoAmount":{"type":"number","example":120},"customAmount":{"type":"number","nullable":true},"costSoFar":{"type":"number","example":75.5},"costPredicted":{"type":"number","example":145},"kwhSoFar":{"type":"number","example":450.5},"kwhPredicted":{"type":"number","example":890},"granularityTypeId":{"type":"integer","example":7},"granularityType":{"type":"string","example":"month"}},"title":"BudgetResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
